draft.conclusion: I found the main concern but have not completed the evidence, impact, fix, or test analysis.

findings.problem: self.__all__ is None exactly when the module defines no __all__ (initialized to None in __init__; inspect.getall returns None for a missing __all__; ignore_module_all keeps it None), so implicit member discovery is fully preserved for those modules. none 未定义 none 没有定义 none absent getall none 隐式 保留 implicit preserved 初始化 none
